source.title: Guidance for Professional Practice: Examining patients who present with flashes and floaters
source.population: People presenting with flashes and/or floaters.
source.exclusions: Exact for flashes-and-floaters history, examination, referral, and safety-net documentation; UAE pathways require clinician review.

exact_location.heading: Principles A286–A291 — history, vitreous and fundal examination, records

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports detailed symptom and risk-factor history, anterior-vitreous review, dilated fundal examination, written information, local-protocol referral, and complete records.

items.rationale: Supports symptom, risk-factor, vitreous and dilated-fundal examination records for floaters; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports referral for retinal detachment, symptomatic retinal breaks or tears, pigment or haemorrhage, and safety-net information about new retinal-break or detachment symptoms.
